name: @liorandb/core
description: LioranDB Core Module – Lightweight, local-first, peer-to-peer database management for Node.js.

scripts.test: npm run build && node __tests__/compaction.test.mjs && node __tests__/wal-recovery.test.mjs && node __tests__/wal-partial-write.test.mjs && node __tests__/ipc-multiprocess.test.mjs && node __tests__/replication-follower.test.mjs && node __tests__/replication-stream.test.mjs && node __tests__/sharding.test.mjs && node __tests__/storage-options.test.mjs && node __tests__/latency-budgets.test.mjs && node __tests__/transactions.test.mjs && node __tests__/query-optimization.test.mjs && node __tests__/cache-engine.test.mjs && node __tests__/backpressure.test.mjs && node __tests__/chunked-inserts.test.mjs && node __tests__/indexing.test.mjs && node __tests__/backup-pitr.test.mjs && node __tests__/id-index-startup.test.mjs && node __tests__/ipc-timeout-retry.test.mjs

author: LioranGroup
